elements.sent-2411-458: Given a closed, connected, relatively-spin Lagrangian submanifold in a closed symplectic manifold, we associate to it a curved, gapped, filtered, $A_{n, K}$-algebra over the Novikov ring with integer coefficients.

elements.sent-2411-460: To illustrate our framework, we give a proof of the Quantum Lefschetz Hyperplane Theorem in the K$\ddot a$hler case, and associate virtual fundamental classes to the moduli spaces used in local Gromov-Witten theory, in the symplectic case.
